name: L-6 aggregator blocks a pattern with fewer than 3 supporting PRs per the architecture evidence threshold
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'BLOCKED' out.txt && grep -q 'evidence_count=2' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
